overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage follows a character with a prosthetic leg carrying an LED-illuminated umbrella through a rain-soaked urban downtown at night. The character navigates wet intersections and sidewalks while neon billboards and streetlights reflect off the glistening pavement, creating a moody, atmospheric scene reminiscent of GTA V with visual mods.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked urban intersection with neon signage

events.description: character separates from initial group of pedestrians and continues forward alone
distant vehicle headlights approach through the rainy intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through wet intersection with illuminated purple umbrella, prosthetic left leg visible

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking away from camera toward left side of intersection

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt with reflective puddles mirroring neon lights and street lamps
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on high-rise building facade
modern glass office building with interior lights glowing through windows
tall metal pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy urban intersection at night, following a character with a prosthetic leg and illuminated umbrella. The character initially walks alongside other pedestrians before separating to cross the wide intersection alone, with neon billboards and glass buildings visible through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street crossing with active vehicle traffic

events.description: black sedan drives past from right to left, headlights cutting through rain
red pickup truck passes by in the opposite direction on the wet road

agents.ego_description: navigating across multi-lane road between passing vehicles, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through intersection, tires splashing through puddles
red pickup truck passing by with headlights illuminating the rainy street

entered.detail: painted white zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area
decorative black cast-iron street lamp with warm glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the multi-lane street, navigating between vehicles including a black sedan and red pickup truck. The wet crosswalk markings are visible underfoot as the character moves from the open intersection toward the opposite sidewalk, with ornate street lamps lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk lined with digital billboards and hedge walls

events.description: character steps from street onto concrete sidewalk and continues forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, illuminated umbrella casting purple glow on wet pavement

entered.detail: wet concrete pavement with red painted curb line and square tile pattern
tall dense green hedge running parallel to the sidewalk
large vertical digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements on building facade
black ornate lamp post with bright circular light

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a tall hedge wall on the left and digital billboards on the right. The heavy rain continues to fall, creating reflective pools on the pavement as the character passes under ornate street lamps, moving deeper into the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban intersection that transitions into a narrow, neon-lit sidewalk. It begins by following a character with a prosthetic leg and an illuminated umbrella as they separate from a crowd of pedestrians to cross a wide, rain-drenched intersection surrounded by glass buildings. As the character moves across the multi-lane street, the camera tracks them navigating between a black sedan and a red pickup truck over glistening crosswalk markings. The scene then shifts from the open road to the opposite sidewalk, where the character passes under ornate street lamps. Finally, the path narrows as the character walks between a tall hedge wall and glowing digital billboards, moving deeper into the city through heavy rain and reflective pools of water.
